历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including former Science Category) was approximately 7181 → 5887 → 4475 → 5535. Over the past 4 years, it has fluctuated significantly, with the highest in 2022 (7181), the lowest in 2024 (4475), and a rebound to 5535 in 2025, showing an overall volatile trend. The baseline for 2025 is about 5535th place. The enrollment plan for this university in Ningxia's Physics Category was 22 in 2022, 23 in 2023, 21 in 2024, and 21 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 21, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction, having a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanchang University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 74th, having been stable in the 69–78 range in recent years, with a solid university level. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is somewhat positive; the men's volleyball team winning the CUVA University Volleyball League championship has increased the university's exposure. It ranks 43rd in Douyin popularity (relatively hot), with a large short video exposure, reflecting a rise in application attention. An abnormal signal in the admission cutoff line occurred in 2023 but its impact has faded. Food Science and Engineering is A+ (fifth round of discipline evaluation), medical fields (Clinical Medicine, Optometry and Ophthalmology, etc.) are traditional strengths, and Computer Science and Technology is a national first-class undergraduate major, strongly attracting science students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be socially popular, while Clinical Medicine and Stomatology remain highly recommended, benefiting the application for related majors at this university. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Ningxia is about 66,000, a slight increase of about 0.16% from 2025 (65,897), with an estimated 44,550 in Physics Category, intensifying competition slightly. Nanchang University is located in Jiangxi Province, far from Ningxia, making it a cross-provincial enrollment. The enrollment scale in Ningxia is small (21 in Physics Category), with a very low enrollment proportion, so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 5535, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, a slight increase in local candidates, a somewhat positive university reputation, and relatively hot Douyin popularity, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for the 2026 Physics Category will slightly shift backward (competition slightly intensifies), with a predicted minimum ranking of about 5565, in the range of 5065–6065.

If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 5000), focus on applying for top Tier 1 majors like Clinical Medicine and Computer Science and Technology. For rankings in the middle of the range (5300–5700), prioritize Tier 2 majors such as Pharmacy and Preventive Medicine. For rankings near the upper limit of the range (around 6000), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.
